title: Amtech L1350 101 Piece Screwdriver and bit Set
features: VERSATILE: This 101 piece screwdriver and bit set contains a comprehensive assortment of bits, drive sockets, adaptors, holders and a ratchet handle
PERFECT HOME DIY KIT: Supplied in a sturdy, blow moulded plastic carry case, it is the ideal kit for a wide range of household, DIY and garage jobs
MULTI-DRIVE: Compatible with 1/4" and other common drive sizes
IDEAL FOR DIY: Perfect for household maintenance and general repair tasks
GARAGE & AUTOMOTIVE USE: Suitable for mechanics and workshop environments
description: Product Description * Set includes 77pc 25mm bits including Phillips, Slotted, Pozi, Torx, Square and Hex * 1pc 25mm bit adaptor * 6pc 50mm bits * 1pc 50mm bits adaptor * 1pc 50mm bits adaptor - - There's nothing more satisfying that a job well done, whether that's a major project or a small repair but some of us need a bit of a helping hand in terms of getting the right tool for the job.Amtech have literally thousands of high quality products and you are almost guaranteed to find exactly what your looking for. Safety Warning No
